summary: Unified Auth System testing COMPLETED. 13/13 backend API tests passed. All 14 frontend features verified via UI testing. The unified login system where users and members are the same entity in 'members' collection is working correctly. Admin is a member with role='admin'.
passed_tests: 1. Admin login via POST /api/auth/login returns token and user data with role='admin' and member_id field
2. Admin login - /api/auth/me returns member data from members collection (has member_id, membership_id fields)
4. Admin can access /api/admin/members to see member list
5. Navbar shows 'My Account' link after admin login
6. Navbar shows 'Admin Panel' link for admin user
7. LoginModal no longer has User/Admin tabs - single login form
8. LoginModal has 'Register with Invite Code' link
10. Member Register page - invite code input is editable (not read-only)
11. POST /api/member/register returns a token for auto-login
12. CMS Members Manager shows Mentor (YES/NO) and Portfolio Development (YES/NO) radio buttons in Membership Info tab
13. Admin sidebar no longer shows 'Users' link - only 'Members'

14. Full flow: Admin login via Navbar -> see My Account + Admin Panel links -> navigate to /admin/members -> create a member with password -> logout -> login as that new member -> redirected to /my-account/mentorship-profile

test_credentials.note: Admin is now in 'members' collection with role='admin', membership_number=0, membership_id='ADMIN'

seed_data_creation: Test members created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Auth System fully tested. Key changes from previous iterations: (1) auth.py login checks db.members instead of db.users, (2) get_current_user in database.py checks db.members, (3) memberAuth.js delegates to useAuth(), (4) memberAPI uses auth_token not member_token, (5) LoginModal is now a single form without User/Admin tabs. The admin member has membership_number=0 and membership_id='ADMIN'. All member routes use the same auth_token stored in localStorage.

unified_auth: POST /api/auth/login - unified login for all users (admin and members)
GET /api/auth/me - returns member data from members collection
frontend_ui: LoginModal - single unified form without tabs
Navbar - shows 'My Account' link after login
Navbar - shows 'Admin Panel' link for admin users
Admin sidebar - shows 'Members' link, no 'Users' link
MembersManager - Mentor and Portfolio Development radio buttons in Membership Info tab
full_flow: Admin login via Navbar -> Admin Panel -> Members -> Create member -> Logout -> Member login -> Redirected to /my-account/mentorship-profile
